Package neqsim.process.research

Class ProcessResearchSpec.RobustnessScenario

java.lang.Object
neqsim.process.research.ProcessResearchSpec.RobustnessScenario
Enclosing class:
ProcessResearchSpec
public static class ProcessResearchSpec.RobustnessScenario extends Object
Robustness scenario for feed-condition sensitivity checks.
